question: What is the smallest self-dual coalgebra whose coproduct can absorb its own inconsistency morphisms while preserving finality without external observers?

responses_summary.grok:
The trivial (zero) coalgebra on the initial/terminal object.

This is the unique (up to isomorphism) structure satisfying the stated closure conditions by vacuity: its coproduct is the zero morphism,
